name: Jack and Jill Cookies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Combine shortening, brown sugar, salt, vanilla, and egg; beat until well mixed. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt; stir into shortening mixture. Stir in oats, prunes, and apricots. Place tablespoons of dough on greased cookie sheets and flatten with a flat-bottomed glass covered with a damp cloth. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes.
